title: Jocker Woods Double Strength Cleaning Vinegar - 5 litres - 10% Acidity with the fresh smell of lemons
features: Only one bottle to store that goes further
Use at 10% for twice the cleaning effect or dilute with an equal amount of water for the original strength
description: The amazing Jocker Woods Cleaning Vinegar but now as a DOUBLE STRENGTH version. 10% Acidity, it can either be used at this strength for double the cleaning power or diluted to with an equal amount of water to being it to the original 5% acidity. Double the acidity with half the packaging and only one bottle to store, lighter to transport and all the packaging 100% recyclable making this better for our environment.
